summary: Tested Soul Made™ trigger placement on Adopt, Farewell, and Emergency pages. All three triggers are present, visible, clickable, and open the SoulMadeModal correctly. ProductCard attach_or_create_ticket endpoint verified working. No PersonalisedBreedSection imports in Adopt/Farewell pages.

adopt_soul_made_trigger.text:
✦ Soul Made™ — Make it personal
Upload photo · Concierge® creates a custom keepsake for your new dog
adopt_soul_made_trigger.position: After Mira's Adoption Picks section, before GuidedAdoptPaths
adopt_soul_made_trigger.modal_content: SOUL MADE™ · ADOPTION, 'Made for Mojo.' with breed-specific product list

farewell_soul_made_trigger.text:
✦ Soul Made™ — In memory of Mojo
Upload a photo · Concierge® creates a meaningful keepsake
farewell_soul_made_trigger.position: After Mira's Picks section, before GuidedFarewellPaths
farewell_soul_made_trigger.modal_content: SOUL MADE™ · FAREWELL with memorial product list (Indie Portrait Frame, Indie Memorial Ornament, etc.)

emergency_soul_made_trigger.text:
✦ Soul Made™ — Custom safety gear
ID tags, medical alert collars, emergency go-bags — made for Mojo
emergency_soul_made_trigger.position: After Mira's Emergency Picks section, before GuidedEmergencyPaths
emergency_soul_made_trigger.modal_content: SOUL MADE™ · EMERGENCY with emergency product list (Indie ID Tag, Indie Emergency Info Card, etc.)

personalised_breed_section_cleanup.status: PASS - No PersonalisedBreedSection in Adopt/Farewell pages

critical_code_review_comments: All three Soul Made™ triggers correctly placed with proper data-testid attributes and onClick handlers
SoulMadeModal receives correct pillar, pillarColor, and pillarLabel props for each page
Farewell trigger shows dynamic 'In memory of {petName}' text using actual pet name
Emergency trigger correctly shows 'Custom safety gear' static text
ProductCard.jsx handleServiceRequest (line 633-676) correctly calls attach_or_create_ticket and shows 'Sent to Concierge!' toast
No PersonalisedBreedSection import in AdoptSoulPage.jsx or FarewellSoulPage.jsx - clean
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Soul Made™ triggers implemented and working: adopt (data-testid='adopt-soul-made-trigger'), farewell (data-testid='farewell-soul-made-trigger' with 'In memory of [petName]' text), emergency (data-testid='emergency-soul-made-trigger' with 'Custom safety gear' text). All open SoulMadeModal correctly. ProductCard attach_or_create_ticket verified. No PersonalisedBreedSection in Adopt/Farewell. Test user: dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123, pet: Mojo (Indie breed). Use mobile viewport 430x900.
